description: The 'Select Seats' modal is open and shows a loading spinner for the seat selector.
frame_description: Loading spinner visible in the seat selection modal.

description: The seat map for Flight 1 (SYD to MEL) finishes loading.
frame_description: Seat map for the first flight leg is now visible.

description: User examines the seat map for the first flight leg without making a selection.
frame_description: User moves cursor over the seat map while reviewing options.

description: User clicks the 'NEXT FLIGHT' button to move to the seat selection for the return leg.
frame_description: Cursor clicks the blue 'NEXT FLIGHT' button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: Loading spinner appears while the seat map for the second flight leg loads.
frame_description: Loading seat selector message and spinner for Flight 2.

description: The seat map for Flight 2 (MEL to SYD) finishes loading.
frame_description: Seat map for the second flight leg is now visible.

description: User clicks on seat '5E' in the seat map.
frame_description: User selects a specific seat, triggering a confirmation popover.

description: User clicks the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button in the selection popover.
frame_description: Cursor clicks the blue 'CONFIRM SEAT' button.

description: User clicks the 'DONE' button to finalize seat selection and close the modal.
frame_description: Cursor clicks the 'DONE' button at the bottom right.

description: The seat selection modal closes and the main page updates to show the selected seat 'Preferred 5E' and a total of $28.00.
frame_description: The main baggage page now displays the confirmed seat selection details.
